text:
Wig & Pen is a store located in Antokiba on Greed Island. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 14, Chapter 129 

Overview

The outside of the store has various posters attached to its storefront window. 

Plot

Greed Island arc

Upon entering Antokiba, Gon and Killua pass by this store. 

Trivia

The "Wig & Pen" store is a reference to a real establishment: the former "The Wig & Pen Club" that was built in 1625 and is located in the Strand City of London, England (UK).

Manga and Anime Differences

The store does not appear in either anime adaptation.

References
